name: crema
description: Crema — minimal F&B ERP. Root scripts for one-command setup and dev.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:setup: npm run --prefix backend prisma:migrate && npm run --prefix backend seed
scripts.env:init: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='backend/.env.example';const dst='backend/.env';if(!fs.existsSync(dst)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Created backend/.env from .env.example — edit DATABASE_URL if your Postgres user differs.')}else{console.log('backend/.env already exists, leaving it alone.')}"
scripts.setup: npm run env:init && npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
